app.title: Crop to Meme
app.tagline: IIIF artworks · MediaPipe face detection · shareable URLs

home.step1: 1. Pick an artwork - search the Art Institute of Chicago, or paste any IIIF info.json / manifest URL.
home.step2: 2. Pick a face - MediaPipe runs in your browser to find faces.
home.step3: 3. Caption + share - auto-captioned from the artwork's metadata. Edit, shuffle, copy the link, or download as JPEG.

paste.label: Paste a IIIF info.json URL or Presentation manifest URL (or raw JSON)

faces.none: No faces found. Try another work.

about.heading: About
about.summary: Browse IIIF artworks, detect faces, crop a tile, slap meme text on top, share via URL. All client-side, no server.
about.promptsIntro: This project was scaffolded and iterated entirely through prompts to Claude.
